queries.question: For each student, show the name of courses they are in.
queries.sql: select students.fullname , courses.coursename from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?coursename WHERE {
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?enrollments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?courses p:CourseName ?coursename .
}

queries.question: What courses are all students enrolled in at the same time and who are their teachers?
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.CourseName, Courses.TeacherName  from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID   GROUP BY Enrollments.CourseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Enrollments.StudentID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Students)

queries.question: Give me the names of the courses students are in.
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.CourseName  from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID   GROUP BY Enrollments.CourseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Enrollments.StudentID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Students)

queries.question: Show me the courses that each student is enrolled in and their teachers.
queries.sql: select students.fullname , courses.coursename , courses.teachername from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?coursename ?teachername WHERE {
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?enrollments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?courses p:CourseName ?coursename .
  ?courses p:TeacherName ?teachername .
}

queries.question: Which teacher do all students have?
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.TeacherName  from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID   GROUP BY Enrollments.CourseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Enrollments.StudentID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Students)

queries.question: For every student, show the teachers that they have.
queries.sql: select students.fullname , courses.teachername from Enrollments join Courses on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID join Students on Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?teachername WHERE {
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?enrollments p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?courses p:TeacherName ?teachername .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the names of the courses students are in.
Show me the courses that each student is enrolled in and their teachers.
Give me the teachers that every student has.
